name: Unbelievable Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a cookie sheet.
2. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
3. Beat together the butter, sugar, egg, orange zest, and almond extract in a bowl until well combined.
4. Using your fingers, press the oatmeal into the butter mixture until the dough just holds together.
5. Form the dough into small balls using the tines of a fork.
6. Place the cookie balls on the prepared sheet.
7. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Yield: 2 1/2 dozen cookies
